description: Extracts skills from resume text and job description text, identifies matched and missing skills, calculates a readiness score (percentage), generates a learning roadmap, and recommends free online courses from Coursera, edX, YouTube, and freeCodeCamp for each missing skill.

recommended_courses.skill: The missing skill this course addresses
recommended_courses.platform: Platform offering the course (Coursera, edX, YouTube, freeCodeCamp)

example_response.learning_roadmap: Narrative learning path to acquire missing skills
